---
title: "Website Performance & Funnel Analysis"
image: "https://placehold.co/600x400?text=Campaign+Dashboard"
categories: [Marketing Analytics, Google Analytics, Funnel Anlysis, Customer Insights]
index: 1
---

#### **Overview**  
Analyzed user behavior, demographics, and conversion funnels using Google Analytics to identify high-value audiences, optimize ad targeting, and reduce drop-offs in program enrollment.

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### **Learning Outcomes**  
- Analyzed user demographics and behavior using GA4  
- Evaluated traffic sources and acquisition channels  
- Conducted funnel analysis to identify drop-off points  
- Assessed landing page performance and user journeys  
- Identified high-value audience segments  
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### **Key Skills Gained**  
- Identified major drop-offs in the enrollment funnel  
- Discovered high-traffic segments with low conversion rates  
- Highlighted mismatch between traffic sources and conversion quality  
- Improved ad targeting toward high-converting audiences  
- Provided recommendations to optimize conversion performance  
:::
:::
